speaker: speaker1
text: The product's selling points is its advanced technoledge .

speaker: speaker2
text: Unfortunately , it's just too expensive for majority of consumer to afford .

speaker: speaker1
text: Why is the price so high ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It's not just that the price is high , it's that the overhead to update an entire computer system to be compatible is costly .

speaker: speaker2
text: Most current computer systems simply can't handle it because this model truly has extraordinary capabilities .

speaker: speaker1
text: Maybe after the next generation of technology comes out , the price of this model will become more affordable .

speaker: speaker2
text: But by then , the technology will be outdated .

speaker: speaker1
text: True , but our focus has never been affordability anyway . Coastwise , we may not be very competitive , but qualitywise , we definitely have an edge .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's right , no one else has a product on the market now that is comparable .

speaker: speaker1
text: This model has advanced technoledge , superior components , it is compact , and it's a top-quality product .

speaker: speaker2
text: I guess you get what you pay for .
